title: Saturn
description: A simple server modpack that optimizes the vanilla experience.
body:
Saturn is a fabric-based server modpack designed to optimize the vanilla performance without disrupting the overall gameplay experience, The configuration files shipped in this modpack can freely be modified to your own needs.

## Mods used for this pack

- [CrashExploitFixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/crashexploitfixer) - **DrexHD**,
- [disconnect-packet-fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/disconnect-packet-fix) - **ascpixi**,
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - **modruss50** and **Player7457**,
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - **malte0811**,
- [FreedomChat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/freedomchat) - **ocelotpotpie**,
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - **2No2Name** and **jellysquid3**,
- [ModernFix-mVUS](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix-mvus) - **Coredex**,
- [Moonrise](https://modrinth.com/mod/moonrise-opt) - **jpenilla** and **spottedleaf**,
- [RecipeCooldown](https://modrinth.com/mod/recipecooldown) - **AmberFrost**,
- [Semblance](https://modrinth.com/mod/semblance) - **EcoBuilder13**,
- [ServerCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/servercore) - **Wesley1808**,
- [Spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark) - **lucko**.

## Disclaimers

1. FreedomChat has been intentionally included as the chatting system has a random chance of causing placeholder errors - If you are not satisified with this then this mod is removable at anytime,
2. Semblance modifies the F3 screen to replace the "fabric" branding with this modpack's name and purely cosmetic.
